ALSO ALSO!!! THIS IS SO UNRELATED BUT I WANTED TO INFODUMP ABOUT MY MALE PERSONA SO HERE Y'ALL CAN HAVE IT:

⚠ TWs for mentions of religious guilt/trauma and violence. This is oc lore and does not reflect my feelings or thoughts. ⚠

Osatani Haruhiro is a Japanese and pourtarican man, standing at a mere 5'2. He's 21 years old. He's transgender, and has only recently invested in top surgery. Appearance wise, he has tan skin, chin-length, spiky pink hair and bangs that veer more towards the right of his face. He has freckles and dons a number of bandages. Osatani shows a lot of skin, which is scarred. His attire consists of a short jacket, and a sort of harness that he wears around his chest. He also has a big pendant. He has a number of piercings, including: eyebrow, snake bites, septum, nipples, and belly button. Osatani is chaotic and has undiagnosed mental illnesses. His trauma is primarily religious. From 18 to 19, he was a nun. However, he'd been harboring his secret of being transgender from his discriminative family. This was while he was pre-transition. Osatani was angry at the church, and so one day, he decides to attend mass, only to set the church ablaze and kill everyone inside. There's a warrant out for his arrest, but he's never been caught. Osatani has a nicotine addiction, but hates any alcohol, even wine. He's skilled in handling weapons like machine guns and large knives. He likes poetry, salty things, and the scent of gasoline. He dislikes mentions of his past, cheese, and restrictive clothing. His hobbies include: dancing, singing, smoking, and makeup. Osatani is mentally unstable and would be admitted to a ward due to his behavior. However, insanity can't be pleaded in court. He's aware of what he's done. On the regular, Osatani is very loud and clingy, but carries a strange elegance at the same time. He's very emotional and expressive. 

That's about it for my yapping today!

I hope you guys like the bot! 🎀 Enjoy!

Xoxo, Blade! 💖
